title: Musopen (Free)
query: mediatype:audio AND collection:musopen AND -subject:"spoken word" AND -mediatype:audiobook
notes: Musopen public-domain and Creative Commons classical recordings. Non-commercially-usable licenses (NC/ND/other/unknown) are filtered out in-app at album resolution; only pd, cc0, cc-by, and cc-by-sa are indexed.

title: Netlabels (Free)
query: mediatype:audio AND collection:netlabels AND -subject:"spoken word" AND -mediatype:audiobook
notes: Internet Archive netlabel releases. Non-commercially-usable licenses (NC/ND/other/unknown) are filtered out in-app at album resolution; only pd, cc0, cc-by, and cc-by-sa are indexed.
